issues.description: Blocker ability is a static keyword mechanic, not a triggered effect. Should not appear in effects array—it's handled by the 'Blocker' trait/keyword.
Trigger should be 'EndOfTurn', not 'Activated'. Text reads '[End of Your Turn]', which is a passive trigger, not an activated ability.

Action type 'GiveDon' is incorrect. Text says 'Set up to 1 of your DON!! cards as active', which means activating resting DON cards. Should be a custom action or 'ActivateDon' if available; 'GiveDon' adds new DON counters, not activates existing ones.
'TurnCount' condition is unnecessary and incorrect. The effect triggers at end of turn with no special turn count requirement.
